# SplurgeGuard

> A 100% offline, gamified personal finance PWA that helps you fight impulse spending through a cooling-off vault, smart daily limits, and discipline points.

SplurgeGuard runs entirely in your browser via localStorage — no accounts, no servers, no tracking. It uses behavioral friction (cooling-off periods, daily limits, streaks) to help you build financial discipline.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Daily limit ring, active challenges, streak, and rank progress.
- [Vault](/vault): Cooling-off queue for impulse purchases — items unlock after a delay so you can decide rationally.
- [Stats](/stats): Spending breakdown, burn rate, vice firewall, and the Freedom Engine (preserved capital).
- [Rewards](/exchange): Spend earned Discipline Points on real-world rewards you've defined.
- [Settings](/settings): Identity, budget cycle, notifications, backup/restore, and DP rules.
